# glitchtip_teams (Data Source)

Lists all teams in a GlitchTip organization. Useful for iterating over existing teams (e.g. with `for_each`) without enumerating them by hand.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all teams in an organization.
data "glitchtip_teams" "all" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
}

output "team_slugs" {
  value = [for t in data.glitchtip_teams.all.teams : t.slug]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization whose teams are listed.

### Read-Only

- `teams` (Attributes List) All teams in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the team was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the team.
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the team.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the team within its organization.
